data.title: Boeing leads list of 5 stocks to watch in short week, with strong technical action from various groups.
data.description: In the latest update, it has been reported that five stocks displaying robust technical performance across different sectors have grabbed attention. Among these stocks are Boeing, Viking Holdings, TJX, and an artificial intelligence-based construction company. Boeing particularly stands out as it remains within the buy zone, making it a key player among the highlighted stocks to watch this week. This update was unveiled by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Study indicates WLFI as potential 'early warning signal' in crypto; it dropped over 5 hrs before $6.9B liquidation event.
data.description: WLFI, which has connections to former President Trump, experienced a significant drop of over five hours before a massive $6.9 billion cryptocurrency liquidation event. This has prompted concerns regarding potential early indicators of market stress.

data.title: AlloyX Limited partners with Bahrain FinTech Bay to boost stablecoin innovation.
data.description: AlloyX Limited revealed a key collaboration with Bahrain FinTech Bay, aimed at speeding up the integration of regulated stablecoin applications. The partnership signifies a significant move in the fintech industry, with prospects of enhancing the utility and adoption of stablecoins. This strategic alliance is set to leverage the expertise and resources of both entities, indicating a mutual commitment to driving innovation and growth in the sector. The collaboration is expected to benefit a wide range of stakeholders, including investors, businesses, and consumers, by promoting the development of secure and compliant stablecoin solutions. The partnership between AlloyX Limited and Bahrain FinTech Bay highlights the increasing relevance and potential of stablecoins in the evolving financial landscape, reflecting a growing trend towards digital asset integration. The move is anticipated to have a positive impact on the market, potentially leading to enhanced stability and efficiency within the digital asset ecosystem. The alliance underscores the importance of collaborative efforts in fostering technological advancements and regulatory compliance, signaling a promising future for stablecoin applications.

data.title: Trump's tariffs backfired, 130,000 jobs added in January. Trump admitted 'mistake' in appointing Fed Chair in 2017. Goldman Sachs highlights 7 stocks to benefit from memory shortage.
data.description: At the beginning of this week, let's recap some significant news from the past week. President Donald Trump has publicly acknowledged his mistake in overlooking Kevin Warsh for the position of Federal Reserve Chair in 2017. Trump referred to this as a "major error," admitting that Warsh was originally his preferred choice for the role, but was influenced by then-Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin. Warsh ended up being the runner-up in the selection process, with Jerome Powell ultimately becoming the Federal Reserve Chair. In a recent interview with Fox Business, Trump confessed to this oversight. Additionally, Goldman Sachs has identified 7 stocks that are anticipated to benefit from a memory shortage. For further details, you can find the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Our Generation adds new limited-edition seasonal dolls at Target, after previous success with releases for Day of the Dead, Halloween, and Christmas.
data.description: A new line of limited-edition seasonal dolls is set to launch at Target, catering to collectors and families. Scheduled for release in New York on February 15, 2026, the expansion of Our Generation builds on the popularity of previous limited-edition collections for Day of the Dead, Halloween, and Christmas. This new series aims to captivate audiences with unique designs and will be available in select quantities at Target stores.

data.title: PEPE price up 25.65% but mixed signals suggest uncertain outlook. Bullish momentum with RSI at 56.98, but bearish MACD.

These conflicting signals suggest uncertainty regarding the future price direction of PEPE.

data.title: In 2026, as venture capital funding rises, more start-ups aim to become the next big thing, possibly creating a 'Soonicorn'.
data.description: With an increase in venture capital funding flowing into start-ups of varying sizes, a growing number of companies are positioning themselves as potential industry leaders.

data.title: CEOs concerned about politics, tech disruption, and trust issues amid focus on growing sales and profits.
data.description: The challenges of fractured politics, disruptive technologies, and a lack of trust in institutions are impeding the focus on core business activities such as increasing sales and profits. These factors are significantly impacting the ability to achieve growth targets and financial success.

data.title: Mirae Asset to purchase 92% of Korbit for $93M, a South Korean exchange.
data.description: Mirae Asset Consulting has reached an agreement to purchase a 92.06% majority ownership in the South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Korbit for approximately $93 million in cash.
